VAL-E2EE-003.evidence: Vitest file test/e2ee/cipher-runtime.test.ts passed with verbose test-level output (28/28). Coverage includes: encrypted payload does not contain plaintext message body; payload has ciphertext/iv/authTag fields; canary plaintext absent from payload fields; sendEncrypted sends ciphertext body through relay with no plaintext on wire; relay-stored body parses as EncryptedPayload JSON structure.

VAL-E2EE-004.evidence: Verbose vitest output shows recipient decrypt success paths passing: recipient decrypts ciphertext with matching shared secret; round-trip preserves exact content (including unicode/special chars); both parties decrypt each other using DH-shared secret; relay readDecrypted decrypts relay message with matching shared secret and preserves message content.

VAL-E2EE-009.evidence: Tamper/integrity checks all passed in verbose output: tampered ciphertext fails integrity check with CipherError; tampered authTag fails authentication check with CipherError; tampered IV fails decryption with CipherError; truncated/replaced ciphertext fails with CipherError; relay-backed tampered ciphertext/authTag is rejected on readDecrypted. Related wrong-key coverage also passed (decryption with wrong shared secret fails with CipherError), and error-message assertion matches decrypt|integrity|authentication guidance.
